case_title: JARED SETH BRICK et al VS. LEUNG REAL ESTATE SERVICES, LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK, JARED SETH BRICK, SARAH LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG REAL ESTATE SERVICES, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK, JARED SETH BRICK, SARAH LOUISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG REAL ESTATE SERVICES, LLC $1,235.25 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,295.25, REMAINDER OF SECURITY DEPOSIT, MINUS DOOR THAT WAS DAMAGED. WHILE LANDLORD DID NOT GIVE ADEQUATE POST WALK THROUGH LIST TO TENANTS & OPPORTUNITY TO REPAIR, NO EVIDENCE OF BAD FAITH EXISTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,780.00 FILED BY BRICK, JARED SETH BRICK, SARAH LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG REAL ESTATE SERVICES, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY BRICK, JARED SETH LEUNG REAL ESTATE SERVICES, LLC
